data_product.name: product-master-dpp
data_product.purpose: Curated product information and Digital Product Passport preview for Thebenpaul products.

lineage_contract.target: data-layer normalized store -> Iceberg standardized table -> Iceberg curated product data product -> REST/UI/export

gtin.description: Global Trade Item Number that identifies the trade item.
gtin.rule: All identical trade items from the same source carry the same GTIN.

batch_lot_number.description: Production batch or lot for products sharing the same GTIN.

serial_number.description: Unique identifier for each individual product instance.
serial_number.rule: GTIN plus serial number is globally unique for a product instance.
